ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "host" TEXT /* Host website that sets the cookie */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration the cookie remains active */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of cookie (e.g., First Party, Third Party) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cookie's purpose */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* The date when the cookie will expire */,
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the purposes table */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the cookie was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the cookie was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the cookie is currently active */,
  "is_third_party" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the cookie is a third-party cookie */,
  "path" TEXT /* The path where the cookie is active */,
  "secure" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the cookie is secure (HTTPS only) */,
  "http_only" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the cookie is accessible only via HTTP */,
  "same_site" TEXT /* The SameSite attribute of the cookie (e.g., 'Lax', 'Strict') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_host FOREIGN KEY ("host") REFERENCES hosts ("host_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_purpose_id FOREIGN KEY ("purpose_id") REFERENCES purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES cookie_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "host_url" TEXT /* URL of the host website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the host was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the host was updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the host is currently active */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* The contact email for the host */,
  "cookie_policy_url" TEXT /* The URL to the host's cookie policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie type (e.g., First Party, Third Party) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cookie type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy update */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie affected by the policy change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided consent */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was updated */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's consent (e.g., opt-in, opt-out) */,
  "consent_ip" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user provided consent */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the user's browser */,
  "consent_version" INTEGER /* The version of the cookie policy the user consented to */,
  "consent_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the consent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_policies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_policies_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the user account was updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* The URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the purpose (e.g., Analytics, Functional) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the purpose */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the purpose was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the purpose was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the cookies table */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* The URL of the web page where the cookie is used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the cookie is used on the page */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* The last time the cookie was used on the page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the usage record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the usage record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_usage_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the cookies table */,
  "action" TEXT /* The action performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* The date and time the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table (user who performed the action) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_history_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
